# MCP (Model Context Protocol) — Mushrooms by viaSocket

Mushrooms by viaSocket is the MCP layer for AI agents. It exposes 1000+ app integrations as MCP-compatible tools, enabling AI agents, IDEs, and LLM clients to trigger real-world actions across SaaS apps without custom API code.

## Core Links

- [Home](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/): Mushrooms by viaSocket main platform
- [Login](https://app.mushrooms.viasocket.com/login): Sign in to Mushrooms dashboard
- [Integrations](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/#integrations): Browse all available MCP app integrations
- [Pricing](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/pricing): Plans and pricing for Mushrooms

## Blogs

- [What is MCP and Why It's the Future of AI Integration](https://viasocket.com/blog/what-is-mcp-and-why-its-the-future-of-ai-integration): Introduction to MCP and its role in connecting AI agents to real-world tools
- [Connect viaSocket MCP with Your AI Assistant](https://viasocket.com/blog/connect-viasocket-mcp-with-your-ai-assistant): Step-by-step guide to linking viaSocket MCP with AI assistants
- [MCP Servers: A Comprehensive Guide](https://viasocket.com/blog/mcp-servers-a-comprehensive-guide): Deep-dive into MCP server architecture and setup with tools like Cursor, Claude, and Windsurf
- [How viaSocket Works: A Complete Guide](https://viasocket.com/blog/how-viasocket-works-a-complete-guide): End-to-end overview of viaSocket's automation and MCP capabilities

## Documentation

### Overview

- [Understanding MCP](https://viasocket.com/help/viasocket-mcp/understanding-mcp): Core concepts behind Model Context Protocol and how viaSocket implements it
- [MCP Overview](https://viasocket.com/help/viasocket-mcp): Getting started with Mushrooms by viaSocket MCP
- [Fair Usage Policy](https://viasocket.com/help/viasocket-mcp/fair-usage-policy): Usage limits and responsible access guidelines for MCP connections

### AI / IDE Integrations

- [Cursor](https://viasocket.com/help/viasocket-mcp/cursor-integration): Connect Mushrooms MCP with Cursor IDE for AI-assisted development
- [Claude Desktop](https://viasocket.com/help/viasocket-mcp/claude-desktop): Link Mushrooms MCP with Claude Desktop application
- [Claude Desktop Integration Guide](https://viasocket.com/help/viasocket-mcp/claude-desktop/claude-desktop-integration-guide): Step-by-step setup for Claude Desktop MCP connection
- [Claude Web Integration Guide](https://viasocket.com/help/viasocket-mcp/claude-desktop/claude-web-integration-guide): Connect Mushrooms MCP to Claude via the web interface
- [ChatGPT](https://viasocket.com/help/viasocket-mcp/chatgpt): Connect ChatGPT to viaSocket workflows through MCP
- [Visual Studio Code](https://viasocket.com/help/viasocket-mcp/visual-studio-code): VS Code MCP integration setup guide
- [Windsurf](https://viasocket.com/help/viasocket-mcp/wind): Setup instructions for Windsurf MCP integration
- [Zed](https://viasocket.com/help/viasocket-mcp/zed-integration-guide): Connect Mushrooms MCP with the Zed code editor
- [Gemini CLI](https://viasocket.com/help/viasocket-mcp/gemini-cli-integration): Use Gemini CLI with Mushrooms MCP
- [Manus](https://viasocket.com/help/viasocket-mcp/manus-integration): Connect Manus AI agent platform via MCP
- [VAPI](https://viasocket.com/help/viasocket-mcp/vapi): Voice AI integration using MCP and VAPI
- [Ravenala](https://viasocket.com/help/viasocket-mcp/ravenala-integration-guide): Connect Ravenala to viaSocket via MCP

### SDKs

- [Python Client](https://viasocket.com/help/viasocket-mcp/python-client-integration): Use Mushrooms MCP with Python applications and automation scripts
- [TypeScript Client](https://viasocket.com/help/viasocket-mcp/typescript-client-integration): Connect Mushrooms MCP with TypeScript-based projects

### MCP Servers / Tools

- [Anthropic API MCP Server](https://viasocket.com/help/viasocket-mcp/anthropic-api-mcp-server): Connect to Anthropic Claude APIs via Mushrooms MCP server
- [OpenAI API MCP Server](https://viasocket.com/help/viasocket-mcp/openai-api-mcp-server): Access OpenAI APIs through Mushrooms MCP server
- [Amazon Quick Suite MCP Server](https://viasocket.com/help/viasocket-mcp/amazon-quick-suite-mcp-server): Amazon Quick Suite integration through MCP
- [Julius AI MCP Server](https://viasocket.com/help/viasocket-mcp/julius-ai-mcp-server): Julius AI data analysis integration via MCP
- [Warp MCP Server](https://viasocket.com/help/viasocket-mcp/warp-mcp-server): Warp terminal MCP connectivity setup
- [Toolhouse](https://viasocket.com/help/viasocket-mcp/connect-viasocket-with-toolhouse): Connect viaSocket workflows with Toolhouse via MCP

## MCP App URLs

Format: `https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/mcp/{appslug}`

- [Google Sheets](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/mcp/google-sheets): MCP server for Google Sheets automation
- [LeadConnector](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/mcp/leadconnector): MCP server for LeadConnector CRM
- [Airtable](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/mcp/airtable): MCP server for Airtable database workflows
- [Slack](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/mcp/slack): MCP server for Slack messaging and notifications
- [HubSpot](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/mcp/hubspot): MCP server for HubSpot CRM and marketing
- [Zendesk Sell](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/mcp/zendesk-sell): MCP server for Zendesk Sell CRM
- [Zendesk Support](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/mcp/zendesk-support): MCP server for Zendesk support ticket management
- [Razorpay](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/mcp/razorpay): MCP server for Razorpay payment workflows
- [ActiveCampaign](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/mcp/activecampaign): MCP server for ActiveCampaign email and CRM automation
- [Bitbucket](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/mcp/bitbucket): MCP server for Bitbucket repository events
- [Basecamp](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/mcp/basecamp): MCP server for Basecamp project management
- [JustCall](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/mcp/justcall): MCP server for JustCall call logging and SMS
- [Zoho Projects](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/mcp/zoho-projects): MCP server for Zoho Projects task automation
- [Bigin](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/mcp/bigin): MCP server for Bigin CRM pipeline management
- [Zoho CRM](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/mcp/zoho-crm): MCP server for Zoho CRM leads and contacts
- [Zoho Cliq](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/mcp/zoho-cliq): MCP server for Zoho Cliq team messaging
- [Zoho Mail](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/mcp/zoho-mail): MCP server for Zoho Mail email workflows
- [Intercom](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/mcp/intercom): MCP server for Intercom customer messaging
- [Google Drive](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/mcp/google-drive): MCP server for Google Drive file management
- [Google Calendar](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/mcp/google-calendar): MCP server for Google Calendar scheduling
- [Gmail](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/mcp/gmail): MCP server for Gmail email automation
- [Notion](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/mcp/notion): MCP server for Notion pages and databases
- [Microsoft Teams](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/mcp/microsoft-teams): MCP server for Microsoft Teams messaging
- [Dropbox](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/mcp/dropbox): MCP server for Dropbox file sync and sharing

- [OneDrive](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/mcp/onedrive): MCP server for Microsoft OneDrive file management
- [Trello](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/mcp/trello): MCP server for Trello board and card management
- [Asana](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/mcp/asana): MCP server for Asana task and project automation

- [OpenAI](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/mcp/openai): MCP server for OpenAI GPT-powered text generation

- [Apify](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/mcp/apify): MCP server for Apify large-scale web scraping

- [Dialpad](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/mcp/dialpad): MCP server for Dialpad call logging and communication

- [Bubble](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/mcp/bubble): MCP server for Bubble no-code app data workflows

- [Help Scout](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/mcp/help-scout): MCP server for Help Scout support ticket workflows

- [Zoho SalesIQ](https://mushrooms.viasocket.com/mcp/zoho-salesIQ): MCP server for Zoho SalesIQ live chat and visitor tracking
